_comment: STUB stages. Replace with Shaykh-approved content before launch.

stages.name: The Drifter
stages.meaning: Going through the motions. Praying maybe. Providing maybe. Heart not fully in it.
stages.guidance: [STUB] The first step is waking up to where you actually are — not where you tell people you are.

stages.name: The Builder
stages.meaning: Awake to the gap. Moving, but not yet consistent.
stages.guidance: [STUB] You know what needs to change. Now build the habits that make it stick.

stages.name: The Anchored
stages.meaning: Consistent in the fundamentals. Has blind spots he has not faced yet.
stages.guidance: [STUB] Your foundation is solid. Now go deeper into the areas you have been avoiding.

stages.name: The Shepherd
stages.meaning: Living it. Other men look to him.
stages.guidance: [STUB] You are ready to lead other men. Your growth multiplies through the men you serve.
